reason: pass has several distinct, unrelated everyday senses: passport (primary), a workout/work session (träningspass, löppass — very common), and a mountain pass. Both are worth their own cards.
ras = race/breed (primary) and collapse/landslide are two completely unrelated common senses; jordras/prisras is everyday vocabulary.
rykte = rumor (primary) and reputation (gott/dåligt rykte) are distinct, both very common everyday senses.
rymma = hold/have capacity (primary) and escape/run away are two unrelated common senses; rymma från fängelset is basic vocabulary.
skuld = debt (primary) and guilt/blame are distinct, both common everyday senses (skuldkänslor, det är ditt fel/din skuld).
sjö = lake (primary) and sea/open water (till sjöss, sjöfart, ute på sjön) are distinct and both very common in Swedish.
